lingala.run_your_first_program: Tambolisa programɛ na yo ya liboso
lingala.complete_a_challenge_using_fewer_than_: Silisa mokakatano na kosalela blɔ́ki na nse ya 5
lingala.use_random_block_in_a_repeat_loop: Salelá blɔ́ki ya pwasa na kati ya loop ya kozóngela
lingala.add_a_move_forward_block_and_run_it: Bakisa blɔ́ki «Kende liboso» mpe tambolisa yango.
lingala.drag_a_move_forward_block_to_your_prog: Benda blɔ́ki kende liboso na programɛ na yo mpe finá tambolisa!
lingala.draw_a_square_using_move_and_turn_bloc: Bénda karé na kosalela blɔ́ki ya kokende mpe ya kobaluka.
lingala.you_need_4_move_forward_4_turn_right_9: Osengeli na 4× Kende liboso + 4× Baluka na lobɔkɔ ya mobali 90°
lingala.draw_the_same_square_using_a_repeat_bl: Bénda karé wana kaka na kosalela blɔ́ki ya kozóngela.
lingala.use_repeat_4_with_move_forward_and_tur: Salelá kozóngela 4× na kende liboso mpe baluka na lobɔkɔ ya mobali 90° na kati.
lingala.draw_an_equilateral_triangle: Bénda triangle ya bangámbo ndenge moko.
lingala.repeat_3_move_forward_turn_right_120: Zóngela 3×: Kende liboso, Baluka na lobɔkɔ ya mobali 120°
lingala.use_set_color_blocks_between_your_move: Salelá blɔ́ki ya tia langi na kati ya blɔ́ki na yo ya kende liboso.
lingala.repeat_5_move_forward_100_turn_right_1: Zóngela 5×: Kende liboso 100, Baluka na lobɔkɔ ya mobali 144°
lingala.create_a_spiral_that_grows_outward: Salá spiral oyo ekoli na libándá.
lingala.this_is_tricky_try_increasing_the_dist: Oyo ezali mpasi! Meka kobakisa ntáká mbala nyonso.
lingala.repeat_6_move_forward_60_turn_right_60: Zóngela 6×: Kende liboso 60, Baluka na lobɔkɔ ya mobali 60°
lingala.create_any_drawing_with_20_line_segmen: Salá elilingi nyonso na biteni ya molɔngɔ́ 20+.
lingala.draw_a_house_a_square_base_with_a_tria: Bénda ndako: efandelo ya karé na motóndo ya triangle na likoló.
lingala.draw_a_square_then_use_pen_up_to_move_: Bénda karé, na nsima salelá tombola ekomeli mpo na kokende, na nsima bénda triangle mpo na motóndo. Kanisá na ntina ya bangámbo: karé = 90°, triangle = 120°.
lingala.study_this_finished_square_then_click_: Tálá karé oyo esili, na nsima finá tambolisa mpo na komóna ndenge ezali kobéndama.
lingala.notice_the_pattern_move_turn_repeated_: Tálá motindo: kende, baluka, ezóngeli mbala minei.
lingala.this_loop_should_draw_a_square_but_it_: Loop oyo esengelaki kobénda karé kasi kobaluka ezangi. Bakisa baluka na lobɔkɔ ya mobali 90 na kati ya kozóngela.
lingala.add_turn_right_90_after_the_move_forwa: Bakisa baluka na lobɔkɔ ya mobali 90 nsima ya kende liboso, na kati ya blɔ́ki ya kozóngela.
lingala.a_finished_triangle_made_with_a_loop_r: Triangle esili oyo esalemi na loop. Tambolisa yango, na nsima tángá ndenge esalaka.
lingala.repeat_three_times_move_forward_then_t: Zóngela mbala misato: kende liboso, na nsima baluka 120.
lingala.almost_a_hexagon_add_the_missing_turn_: Pene ya hexagon. Bakisa kobaluka oyo ezangi na loop mpo na kokanga yango.
lingala.add_turn_right_60_after_the_move_forwa: Bakisa baluka na lobɔkɔ ya mobali 60 nsima ya kende liboso, na kati ya blɔ́ki ya kozóngela.
lingala.a_spinning_windmill: Masini ya mopɛpɛ oyo ezali kobaluka
lingala.if_on_gem: 💎 Soki ozali likoló ya libanga ya motuya
lingala.check_if_standing_on_a_gem: Talá soki otɛlɛmi likoló ya libanga ya motuya
lingala.pick_up_the_gem_at_current_position: Kamata libanga ya motuya na esika ya sikoyo
lingala.while_not_at_goal: 🏁 Wana okómi naino te na esika ya suka
lingala.repeat_until_reaching_the_goal: Zóngela tii okokóma na esika ya suka
lingala.move_the_robot_forward_3_spaces_to_rea: Lɛngɛla roboti liboso bisika 3 mpo na kokóma na esika ya suka!
lingala.navigate_around_the_corner_to_reach_th: Tambola zingazinga ya litúmu mpo na kokóma na esika ya suka.
lingala.move_forward_then_turn_then_move_forwa: Kende liboso, na nsima baluka, na nsima kende liboso lisusu.
lingala.use_a_repeat_block_to_reach_the_goal_e: Salelá blɔ́ki ya kozóngela mpo na kokóma na esika ya suka na malamu.
lingala.move_through_the_path_and_collect_all_: Leká na nzela mpe lɔkɔta mabanga ya motuya 3 nyonso!
lingala.move_to_each_gem_and_use_collect_gem_o: Kende na libanga mokomoko mpe salelá «Lɔkɔta libanga ya motuya» na mokomoko.
lingala.use_if_wall_ahead_to_navigate_a_maze_w: Salelá «Soki efelo ezali liboso» mpo na koleka na labirinte oyo ezali na babalukeli!
lingala.combine_while_not_at_goal_with_if_wall: Sangisa «Wana okómi naino te na esika ya suka» na «Soki efelo ezali liboso» → baluka na lobɔkɔ ya mobali, soki tɛ́ → kende liboso.
lingala.paint_all_the_unpainted_cells_in_the_r: Pakola basɛlɛ nyonso oyo bapakoli te na molɔngɔ́!
lingala.use_repeat_with_move_forward_and_paint: Salelá kozóngela na «Kende liboso» mpe «Pakola sɛlɛ langi».
lingala.navigate_the_spiral_maze_using_loops_a: Leká na labirinte ya spiral na kosalela ba-loop mpe ba-conditions!
lingala.try_while_not_at_goal_if_wall_turn_rig: Meka «Wana okómi naino te na esika ya suka»: soki efelo → baluka na lobɔkɔ ya mobali, soki tɛ́ → kende liboso.
lingala.collect_all_gems_and_reach_the_goal_us: Lɔkɔta mabanga ya motuya nyonso mpe kóma na esika ya suka! Salelá nyonso oyo oyékólí.
lingala.plan_your_path_carefully_you_may_need_: Bongisa nzela na yo malamu. Okoki kosenga ba-loop oyo ezali na kati ya bango!
lingala.add_coding_blocks_from_this_toolbox_to: Bakisa ba-blɔ́ki ya coding uta na kɛsi oyo ya bisaleli mpo na kotonga programɛ na yo.
lingala.each_block_is_a_command_set_values_wit: Blɔ́ki mokomoko ezali motindo. Tia ba-valeur na ba-champs ya mituya. Benda ba-blɔ́ki mpo na kobongisa lisusu!
lingala.click_run_to_watch_your_program_execut: Finá tambolisa mpo na kotala programɛ na yo ezali kosala litámbé na litámbé na canvas.
lingala.try_challenges_to_learn_cs_concepts_li: Meka mikakatano mpo na koyékola ba-concepts ya sciences ya ordinatɛ́rɛ lokola ba-loop mpe zwa XP! 🏆
lingala.switch_to_code_mode_for_javascript_lik: Bóngola na lolenge ya code mpo na syntaxe lokola JavaScript. Nyonso ezali kaka synchronisé!
lingala.welcome_to_the_coding_playground: Boyei malamu na esika ya kosakana ya coding!
lingala.balanced_bst: Nzeté ya boluki binary oyo etali malamu
lingala.sub_millisecond_imperceptible_to_user_: Na nse ya milliseconde moko. Mosáleli ayoki yango te. Ezali na likámá te mpo na ba-loop ya kati oyo ezali ebele.
lingala.1_ms_well_within_frame_rate_budget_saf: < 1 milliseconde. Na kati ya budget ya frame rate na boboto; ezali na likámá te mpo na ba-handler ya ba-événements ya UI.
lingala.1ms_1s_will_visibly_lag_ui_needs_progr: 1ms–1s. Ekokitisa UI polele; esengeli na barre ya progrès to kolongola na libándá ya thread ya likoló.
lingala.seconds_to_minutes_batch_job_territory: Basegɔnde tii minute. Etúká ya mosala ya batch; mosáleli akei kozwa kafe.
lingala.practically_infinite_at_this_scale_nee: Na solo ezanga nsuka na monɛnɛ oyo. Esengeli na algorithme ya malamu to entrée ya moke.
lingala.set_input_size_loop_depth_data_structu: Tia bonene ya entrée, bozindo ya loop, structure ya données mpe elongi ya recursion. Sakola ndenge code na yo ekosala mbangu (to malɛmbɛ) liboso ya komeka yango. Note te, kolakisa te.
lingala.nested_loop_depth: Bozindo ya loop oyo ezali na kati
lingala.your_hypothesis_which_change_buys_the_: Hypothèse na yo (mbóngwana nini esombaka mbangu eleki monɛnɛ — n ya moke, ba-loop ya moke, to structure ya données ekeseni?)
lingala.e_g_swapping_array_scan_for_hash_looku: Na ndakisa, kobóngola scan ya array na recherche ya hash ekitisaka ntalo ya loop ya libándá na facteur ya n…
lingala.open_questions_no_answer_key: Mituna ya polele (clé ya eyano ezali te)
lingala.why_does_loop_depth_multiply_rather_th: Mpo na nini bozindo ya loop ekómisaka motángo ya misala mbala mingi na esika ya kobakisa yango?
lingala.when_does_it_matter_that_hash_lookup_i: Tango nini ezali na ntina ete recherche ya hash ezali O(1) — na n=10? n=1,000? n=1,000,000?
lingala.exponential_recursion_explodes_after_r: Recursion exponentielle epanzanaka pene nsima ya n nyonso. Ebɛti efelo na esika nini mpenza?
lingala.for_very_small_n_sometimes_o_n_beats_o: Mpo na n ya moke mpenza, mbala mosusu O(n²) elongaka O(n log n). Mpo na nini?
lingala.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Nakoki kolimbola mpo na nini bosangisi oyo ya n, bozindo, structure ya données mpe recursion esukaka awa.
lingala.explain_in_your_own_words: Limbola na maloba na yo moko…
lingala.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget ya boluki — note te, kolakisa te, clé ya eyano te. Ba-motángo ya misala ezali ba-estimation ya boyékoli mpe ya ndakisa oyo ezwaka ~1 GHz ya throughput ya solo; performance ya solo etali cache, prédiction ya branche, JIT mpe ba-constante liboso ya liloba Big-O.
lingala.ai_explains_what_your_code_does: AI elimbolaka oyo code na yo esalaka
lingala.ai_suggests_what_to_try_next: AI epesaka likanisi ya nini ya komeka na nsima
lingala.ai_helps_debug_your_challenge_attempt: AI esungaka kobongisa mabunga ya komeka na yo ya mokakatano
lingala.toggle_drawing_layer_foreground_or_bac: Bóngola couche ya elilingi (liboso to nsima)
lingala.toggle_canvas_coordinate_display: Bóngola bolakisi ya ba-coordonnées ya canvas
lingala.turtle_logo_s_drawing_robot_born_1967: Nkɔ́di — roboti ya kobénda ya LOGO, abotamaki na 1967
lingala.move_forward_turn_pen_down_a_few_primi: Kende liboso, baluka, kitisa ekomeli: mitindo moke ya ebandeli → fractales, ba-spiral, ba-polygone. Buku ya Seymour Papert Mindstorms (1980) emonisaki ete bana bakoki kotonga mayele ya matematíki na koteya nkɔ́di, kasi te na ndenge ya ngámbo.
lingala.robot_navigate_the_grid_collect_solve: Roboti — leká na grille, lɔkɔta, silisa
lingala.sequencing_conditionals_loops_function: Molɔngɔ́ → ba-conditions → ba-loop → ba-function, ekangami na kati ya labirinte oyo okoki komóna. Emonisaka Karel the Robot (Stanford 1981) mpe ba-puzzle ya sika ya code.org. Mabunga ekómaka ya esika: «ebɛti efelo».
lingala.drag_commands_into_your_program_use_if: 💡 Benda mitindo na programɛ na yo. Salelá ba-blɔ́ki ya soki/wana mpo na botamboli ya mayele!
lingala.click_commands_from_the_toolbox_to_bui: Finá mitindo uta na kɛsi ya bisaleli mpo na kotonga programɛ na yo!
lingala.csta_k_12_iste_ct_sequencing_loops_con: CSTA K-12 • ISTE CT • Molɔngɔ́, ba-loop, ba-conditions, ba-algorithme
lingala.click_blocks_above_or_load_a_template_: Finá ba-blɔ́ki na likoló to kɔtisa template mpo na kobanda
lingala.goto_x_coordinate: Coordonnée X ya esika ya kokende
lingala.goto_y_coordinate: Coordonnée Y ya esika ya kokende
lingala.forward_50_right_90_backward_30_repeat:
forward(50)
right(90)
backward(30)

repeat(4, function() {
  forward(100)
  right(90)
})
lingala.commands_forward_n_backward_n_right_de: Mitindo: forward(n) backward(n) right(deg) left(deg) penUp() penDown() setColor("#hex") setWidth(n) circle(r) goto(x,y) home() arc(angle,radius) stamp() playNote(freq,dur). Ba-variable: setVar("name",value) changeVar("name",delta) random("name",min,max) — salelá variable na $ (lokola forward($name)). Ba-loop mpe logique esalelaka ba-accolade: repeat(n){ ... }  while (x < 450){ ... }  if (x > 250){ ... } else { ... }. Ba-function: function myShape(){ ... } na nsima benga yango na myShape(). Ba-condition ekokanisaka x, y, angle to $var na kosalela > < >= <= == != .
lingala.toggle_turtle_cursor_visibility: Bóngola bomonani ya curseur ya nkɔ́di
lingala.toggle_cumulative_drawing_mode: Bóngola lolenge ya elilingi ya kosangisa
lingala.toggle_high_contrast_mode: Bóngola lolenge ya contraste ya likoló
lingala.name_your_creation: Pesa nkómbó na ekelamu na yo
lingala.name_your_creation_2: Pesa nkómbó na ekelamu na yo
